---
title: "Bachelor Project 2025--2026"
subtitle: "Group 16: Digital Governance, Platform Labour, and Power in the Digital Economy"
toc: false
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
     PASSWORD: "BachProject2026"
     To change it, replace the hash below with the SHA-256 of your new password.
     Generate a new hash: echo -n "YourNewPassword" | shasum -a 256
     ============================================================ -->

<style>
  /* Password overlay */
  #password-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
    z-index: 9999;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .password-box {
    text-align: center;
    max-width: 380px;
    padding: 2.5rem;
  }

  .password-box h2 {
    font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #212529;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border: none;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .password-box p {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #6c757d;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .password-input {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
    border: 1px solid #ced4da;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-family: "Source Serif 4", Georgia, serif;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.15s;
  }

  .password-input:focus {
    border-color: #3d5a80;
  }

  .password-btn {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.6rem;
    background: #3d5a80;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }

  .password-btn:hover {
    background: #2e4a6b;
  }

  .password-error {
    color: #c00;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
    display: none;
  }

  /* Course content */
  #course-content {
    display: none;
  }

  /* Session grid */
  .session-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }

  .session-card {
    border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
    border-left: 3px solid #3d5a80;
    border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
    padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
    background: #f8f9fa;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .session-card:hover {
    border-left-color: #2e4a6b;
  }

  .session-card.locked {
    border-left-color: #ced4da;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .session-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .session-title {
    font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #212529;
    margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
  }

  .session-date {
    font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: #6c757d;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .session-description {
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    color: #495057;
    margin: 0.5rem 0 0 0;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .session-link {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #3d5a80;
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border: 1px solid #3d5a80;
    border-radius: 4px;
    transition: all 0.15s;
  }

  .session-link:hover {
    background: #3d5a80;
    color: #fff;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .session-locked-label {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #adb5bd;
  }

  .course-info {
    border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
    background: #f8f9fa;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .course-info p {
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .session-header {
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 0.25rem;
    }
  }
</style>

<!-- Password overlay -->
<div id="password-overlay">
  <div class="password-box">
    <h2>Bachelor Project Materials</h2>
    <p>Enter the password provided by your supervisor.</p>
    <input type="password" id="pw-input" class="password-input"
           placeholder="Password" autocomplete="off"
           onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter') checkPassword()">
    <button class="password-btn" onclick="checkPassword()">Access Materials</button>
    <p class="password-error" id="pw-error">Incorrect password. Please try again.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Course content (hidden until password correct) -->
<div id="course-content">

  <div class="course-info">
    <p><strong>Supervisor:</strong> Dr. Shreyas Meher &middot; <a href="mailto:meher@essb.eur.nl">meher@essb.eur.nl</a></p>
    <p><strong>Meetings:</strong> Thursdays, Mandeville T5-114</p>
    <p><strong>Final submission:</strong> June 25, 2026 via Canvas</p>
  </div>

  <p>Session slides are released each Thursday afternoon, after the meeting has finished. Check back weekly for new materials.</p>

  <div class="session-grid" id="session-grid"></div>

</div>

<script>
  // ---- Configuration ----
  const PASSWORD_HASH = "d05b45993d07044458306933a5861c50f9b74e18ba72378a3dbc1829c050aeba";
  const STORAGE_KEY = "bp2026_auth";

  const sessions = [
    {
      num: 1,
      title: "Kickoff and Brainstorm",
      date: "2026-04-23T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "April 23, 2026",
      desc: "Welcome, logistics, crafting a research question, finding literature, and an overview of key debates in digital governance and platform labour.",
      file: "slides/session1_kickoff.pdf"
    },
    {
      num: 2,
      title: "Research Design (C1) and Literature Review (C2)",
      date: "2026-04-30T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "April 30, 2026",
      desc: "Structuring your introduction, the golden thread from motivation to sub-questions, building a theoretical framework, and writing a critical literature review.",
      file: "slides/session2_research_design.pdf"
    },
    {
      num: 3,
      title: "Revisions of C1 and C2",
      date: "2026-05-07T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "May 7, 2026",
      desc: "Operationalization, types of variables, validity and reliability, and stabilizing your research question before data collection.",
      file: "slides/session3_revisions.pdf"
    },
    {
      num: 4,
      title: "Methodology and Data Collection (C3)",
      date: "2026-05-13T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "May 13, 2026",
      desc: "Choosing between qualitative and quantitative methods, sample size requirements, practical data collection tips, and justifying your choices.",
      file: "slides/session4_methodology.pdf"
    },
    {
      num: 5,
      title: "General Progress and Data Analysis",
      date: "2026-05-21T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "May 21, 2026",
      desc: "Quantitative analysis (regression, t-tests, Cronbach's alpha), qualitative coding and thematic analysis, and reporting findings effectively.",
      file: "slides/session5_progress.pdf"
    },
    {
      num: 6,
      title: "Findings and Analysis (C4)",
      date: "2026-05-28T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "May 28, 2026",
      desc: "Structuring Chapter 4, the distinction between description and analysis, connecting findings to theory, and looking ahead to conclusions.",
      file: "slides/session6_findings.pdf"
    },
    {
      num: 7,
      title: "Revised Findings, Conclusions, and Presentation Prep",
      date: "2026-06-04T14:00:00+02:00",
      display: "June 4, 2026",
      desc: "Writing conclusions and recommendations, preparing your 10-minute presentation, peer review assignments, and final report coherence.",
      file: "slides/session7_conclusions.pdf"
    }
  ];

  // ---- Password check ----
  async function sha256(message) {
    const msgBuffer = new TextEncoder().encode(message);
    const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest("SHA-256", msgBuffer);
    const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));
    return hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")).join("");
  }

  async function checkPassword() {
    const input = document.getElementById("pw-input").value;
    const hash = await sha256(input);
    if (hash === PASSWORD_HASH) {
      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, hash);
      showContent();
    } else {
      document.getElementById("pw-error").style.display = "block";
      document.getElementById("pw-input").value = "";
      document.getElementById("pw-input").focus();
    }
  }

  function showContent() {
    document.getElementById("password-overlay").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("course-content").style.display = "block";
    renderSessions();
  }

  // ---- Session rendering ----
  function renderSessions() {
    const grid = document.getElementById("session-grid");
    const now = new Date();
    grid.innerHTML = "";

    sessions.forEach(s => {
      const releaseDate = new Date(s.date);
      const available = now >= releaseDate;
      const card = document.createElement("div");
      card.className = "session-card" + (available ? "" : " locked");

      let actionHtml;
      if (available) {
        actionHtml = `<a href="${s.file}" target="_blank" class="session-link">Download slides (PDF)</a>`;
      } else {
        actionHtml = `<span class="session-locked-label">Available ${s.display}</span>`;
      }

      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="session-header">
          <div class="session-title">Session ${s.num}: ${s.title}</div>
          <div class="session-date">${s.display}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="session-description">${s.desc}</div>
        ${actionHtml}
      `;
      grid.appendChild(card);
    });
  }

  // ---- Init ----
  (function() {
    const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (stored === PASSWORD_HASH) {
      showContent();
    }
  })();
</script>
```
